notes: Add, list, remove, and create skills via ship skills subcommands
SKILL.md frontmatter emitted with name, description, license, compatibility, allowed-tools, artifacts, and metadata
Template variable resolution via {{ var }} syntax with user vars and runtime-injected context
Runtime context injected as runtime.agents, runtime.providers, runtime.model, runtime.skills
Stable storage key for variable state that survives directory renames, injected as {{ stable_id }}
Three-scope KV state (global, local, project) with merge order defaults > global > local > project
CLI commands set, get, append, reset for managing skill variable state
Compiler resolves per-skill event subscription namespaces from artifact declarations
Artifact type declarations (html, pdf, markdown, image, adr, note, json, url, svg) for platform rendering
Provider compatibility field for restricting skills to specific providers
JSON Schema at schemas/skill.schema.json for SKILL.md frontmatter validation
Install skills from registry, local path, or GitHub URL with optional global scope
ship skill eval command to execute evals.json test cases
Sandboxed execution for third-party skill evals and scripts
Vars derived from env, git context, OS settings
Published list of all runtime-injected vars Ship provides (agents, providers, model, skills, etc.)
Annotation capability in Studio Skills IDE — partially implemented
